title: doryopteris praealta
intro: Doryopteris praealta, also known as the False Staghorn Fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Polypodiaceae, commonly found in tropical regions. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. It has been used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin infections, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea or infusion, or used in its raw form as a poultice or topical application, making it a valuable resource in natural medicine.
